CA-firms/Automated Compliance Deadline R.Schedule Trigger: Checks daily for upcoming compliance deadlines.

CA-firms/Automated Fee Payment Reminders.Schedule Trigger: Checks daily for pending invoice payments.

CA-firms/Automated Fee Payment Reminders.Send message1: Sends a follow-up reminder for 3-day overdue invoices.
CA-firms/Automated Fee Payment Reminders.Send message2: Sends a final notice for 7-day overdue invoices.

CA-firms/Conditional Routing (Handling t.WhatsApp Trigger: Listens for incoming client replies on WhatsApp.
CA-firms/Conditional Routing (Handling t.Switch: Routes the reply based on positive or negative sentiment.
CA-firms/Conditional Routing (Handling t.Send message: Sends a Google Review link to satisfied clients.
CA-firms/Conditional Routing (Handling t.Send message1: Directs unhappy clients to a private feedback form.
CA-firms/Conditional Routing (Handling t.Send email: Alerts the founding partner internally about negative feedback.

CA-firms/One-Click Document Collection.j.Append or update row in sheet: Updates the last reminder date in the tracker.
